title: サロン・ド・ボーテ　シチー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking through campus, I hear some lively
chatter.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What is going on with your hair? You've got leaves, twigs—it's literally a bird's nest up there!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: So what?! That's nothing to make a fuss about!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Uh, pretty sure it is... How did it even get like
that, anyway?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I was surprised to see you fall into that pit you
made yourself.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: My original plan was for you to fall into it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No wonder your hair's a mess in the back.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... Well, yeah. I hadn't planned for this
to take so long though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City is apparently trying to fix Shinko
Windy's hair. But she seems to be having
trouble...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You know what would be cool, Windy? If you had
her give you a superhero hairstyle!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I don't care about no goody two shoes
superhero crap! I walk on the dark side!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But doesn't a strong villain need to look cool
too?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Hrngh?! You... You might have a point there!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I won't take up too much of your
time. Look, even your tail is all disheveled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City goes to work on Shinko Windy's hair
with her scissors and styling products. I stick
around and watch.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Okay... All done. You're good to go.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh... It feels so smooth.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I cut and trimmed the damaged parts while I was
at it.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Uh... huh... I see, I see...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I like it! I should let ya play around with
my hair again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Haha... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: That's so nice! I want City to do my hair too!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I know, right? Windy's so lucky!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you two come over? I can do yours
too.

text_block_list.name: Both Umamusume
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think Biko and Windy would feel awkward if
they were the only ones?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As time goes by, word spreads, and people start
pouring in!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Um, is it just me, or is this starting to way get out
of hand?!
choice_data_list: You'll manage to get through it... somehow...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I beg to differ...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'm rooting for you, City! It's like what Carrot
Ranger says, "When your back is to the corner,
there's only one way out!"

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Bite adversity where it hurts! Grawr, rawr!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Welp... I guess I'm the one who started this whole
mess in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, fine! I'll power through this!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Done... What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... This is amazing! I wasn't sure what to do
with my curly hair.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You've got nice curls, so I tried something to help
highlight them.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: And so, another Umamusume is saved.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Amazing work, City! You're a hero for fighting so
admirably!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, thank you. Don't expect me to be doing
this again any time soon though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can hear the exhaustion in her voice, but she
also seems somewhat pleased with what she's
done.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Okay, hold on, City! Help is on its way! Hang in
there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right, all right! Everyone wait your turn! Line
up here if you want a haircut!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You over there! Stay behind the line so you
don't block the walkway!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: City, I have prepared these for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shing!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Having sharpened these scissors myself, I can
guarantee precision in their cut. I hope they will
serve you well.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Um, why'd you call these two?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo was chasing after me yelling something
about violations!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
B-but when I explained the situation, they said
they were both willing to help!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I... see... I mean, I do appreciate the help, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm still the only one doing the cutting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the right staffing, well-sharpened scissors,
and lively cheers of support, Gold City manages
to pull through.
